---
title: "Joshua Eisner's Website for STA 9750"
---

Hi, my name is Joshua Eisner. I am completing my Master's Degree in Applied Mathematics out of CUNY Queens College. While being in school, I work part-time as a Data Engineer at Cross River, and I will be starting full-time as a Data Science Associate at PwC in August.

```{r}
#| include: false
1+1
```
--------------
Last Updated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%A %m %d, %Y at %H:%M%p")`
